message:
feat: add runtime builder API for structured runtime configuration

Introduce include/asx/runtime/builder.h and src/runtime/builder.c
providing a builder pattern for runtime initialization with chainable
configuration methods. Add comprehensive unit tests in
tests/unit/runtime/test_builder.c. Wire into Makefile and top-level
asx.h header.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -129,6 +129,7 @@ CORE_SRC := \
 
 RUNTIME_SRC := \
 	src/runtime/hooks.c \
+	src/runtime/builder.c \
 	src/runtime/rt.c \
 	src/runtime/equivalence.c \
 	src/runtime/lifecycle.c \
